heading: Annual reports
label: 1684 Annual reports
text: The Secretary shall make annual reports to the Congress on the programs authorized by this subchapter. These reports shall be submitted with the reports required under .section 1606(c) of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1981section 9 of Pub. L. 96–554section 1681 of this title
